title: Navidrome Segment 02
summary: Early development segment covering the Navidrome music server's foundational restructuring: migrating the build system (Viper config paths, Go 1.15 toolchain), adding Subsonic API features (download naming, similar songs), building out the React-based UI (album views, player toolbar, notifications), introducing taglib-based metadata reading, database schema migrations, and numerous translation and dependency updates.
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: Early development segment covering the Navidrome music server's foundational restructuring: migrating the build system (Viper config paths, Go 1.15 toolchain), adding Subsonic API features (download naming, similar songs), building out the React-based UI (album views, player toolbar, notifications), introducing taglib-based metadata reading, database schema migrations, and numerous translation and dependency updates.

nodes.label: React UI Frontend
nodes.description: The React-Admin based web frontend including album views, audio player, playlists, personal settings, layout components, and event streaming. Touched by PRs for album grid refinement (608), persistent player toolbar (467), desktop notifications (645), react-admin upgrade (667), and many dependency bumps.

nodes.label: Subsonic API Layer
nodes.description: The Subsonic-compatible REST API including browsing, streaming, playlists, media retrieval, searching, and response serialization. Touched by PRs for download naming (442), similar songs (576), and major refactors (595, 599).

nodes.label: Database Migrations
nodes.description: SQLite database schema migrations for album size, artist/playlist size, MBIDs, comments/lyrics, and the migration runner itself. Touched by PRs for album size (561), artist/playlist size (572), and UUID refactor (549).

nodes.label: Core Business Logic
nodes.description: Core domain services including artwork handling, media streaming, external info fetching (Last.fm/Spotify), cache warming, archiver, and transcoding. Touched by PRs for similar songs (576), image cache (656), non-square art (658), and major refactors.

nodes.label: Media Scanner
nodes.description: File system scanning, tag reading (taglib and ffmpeg), metadata mapping, playlist sync, and directory walking. Touched by PRs for taglib reader (480), taglib Linux C++11 (529), and scanner improvements in major PRs.

nodes.label: Persistence Layer
nodes.description: SQLite-based repository implementations for albums, artists, media files, playlists, and annotations. Touched by PRs for bypath matching (546), track sort fallback (696), and search improvements.

nodes.label: Server Infrastructure
nodes.description: HTTP server setup, middleware (security headers, CORS), app serving, service worker registration, and SSE event streaming. Touched by PRs for HTTP security headers (545), service worker (537), and serve_index changes.

nodes.label: Domain Models
nodes.description: Go struct definitions for albums, artists, media files, playlists, players, and related types. Touched by PRs for album size (561), artist info (576), and MBIDs (587).

nodes.label: CLI Commands
nodes.description: Cobra-based CLI entry points (root, scan) and wire dependency injection. Touched by PRs for Viper config (426), wire refactors, and scan command improvements.

nodes.label: Configuration & Constants
nodes.description: Application configuration, constants (version, mime types), and logging. Touched by PRs for Viper config paths (426), taglib config, and player adjustments (666).

nodes.label: Go Dependencies
nodes.description: Go module dependency management including upgrades to gomega, bluemonday, squirrel, kr/pretty, logrus, cobra, and the Go 1.15 toolchain bump.

edges.label: UI calls Subsonic REST endpoints for data
